
func (s *Server) handlePOSTArchive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sess, _, ok := s.auth(w, r)
	if !ok {
		return
	}

	var path testapp.PathArchive
	path.Slug = r.PathValue("slug")

	dispatch := func(
		e1 testapp.EventPostsArchived,
	) error {
		{
			j, err := json.Marshal(e1)
			if err != nil {
				return fmt.Errorf("marshaling EventPostsArchived JSON: %w", err)
			}
			err = s.messageBroker.Publish(r.Context(), s.messageBrokerMetrics, EvSubjPostsArchived, j)
			if err != nil {
				return fmt.Errorf("publishing subject %q: %w", EvSubjPostsArchived, err)
			}
		}
		return nil
	}
	err := s.app.POSTArchive(sess, path, dispatch)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "handling action App.Archive", err)
		return
	}
}
